tagline: Localize nomu repo ena veidinadinati yadua.

hero.title: Bula ena veivosa kecega
hero.lede: Na tabana oqo e vakadewataki mai na Resource Translator vakaikoya, ena veisasaga kece ki na main, ki na veivosa kece e tokona na Azure AI Translator.

phrases.welcome: Kidavaki ki na iVurevure ni Dauvakadewa.
phrases.machine_translated: Vakadewataki vakamisini mai na Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Dolava e dua na kerekere ni pull vata kei na vakadewa vou.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Vakauta na nomu parokaramu vakompiuta ena dua ga na vanua e vuravura.
phrases.thank_you: Vinaka vakalevu na nomu tovolea na Resource Translator.

features.reliable: Round-trips na byte yadua ni nomu faile ni ivurevure.
features.configurable: Rorogo, cakacaka, glossary, vosa ca — configurable kece.
features.ci_native: Designed for GitHub Actions and pull-request workflows.

footer.powered_by: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.
footer.view_translation_pr: Raica na kerekere ni pull ni vakadewa se qai oti ga oqo.
